top_signals.title: Google Gemini CLI abused as a hacking agent, malware botnet operator
top_signals.summary: A Russian-speaking threat actor known as "bandcampro" used Google's open-source Gemini CLI AI tool as a hacking agent and to operate a small-scale botnet. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Speech At the Financial Stability Board Virtual Outreach Event
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A sea change in regulatory investigations and enforcement − speech by David Chaplin
top_signals.summary: Given at the 5th Conference on Financial Law and Regulation, University of Leeds School of Law, 24 June 2026

top_signals.title: Mike Ashley’s Frasers feels lift from takeover spree
top_signals.summary: Mike Ashley’s Frasers Group has seen its profit jump as it pushes ahead with a turnaround plan and launches a spree of takeover bids for foreign retailers.  The fashion group, which owns Sports Direct and Flannels, said its recent takeover bids and moves to build stakes in rivals are bolstering its balance sheet amid a [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
top_signals.summary: The deal gives Hyperion an equity stake in Skew and a share of listing-service revenue as it expands the utility of its HYPE treasury assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
